subject: Your Gift Card for Completing the CIBeR Lab Study
body:
Hi {{participant_fname}} {{participant_lname}},

Thank you for participating in our research study with the CIBeR Lab. As compensation for your time, you have a $25 Amazon gift card waiting for you.

Click the link below to claim your gift card:

Claim Your Gift Card

If you have any questions about the study or your compensation, reach out to us directly at COENG-ciber@usf.edu.

Thank you again for your participation.

CIBeR Lab, College of Engineering, USF
